findings.message: 23 pages exceeds the BRIEF's 8-12 two-column (~15 single-column) target; the abstract restates the full three-step gauge arc that Section 9 re-derives, and two Discussion paragraphs re-state Section 7/12 conclusions. Trim 2-4 pages with no argument loss.

General tensor-compiler thesis rests on a single geometry; an optional committed-artifact-only breadth row/table (Mie, waveguide, motor-torque, fiber) would lift dim 2 to ceiling and answer the paper's own one-geometry limitation.

Operator-gated submission TODOs: affiliations, burn/cubecl f64 tracking-issue URL, geode-fem archival DOI, whiteroom cite-vs-acknowledge decision, acknowledgment wording. Correctly not scored down; hard blockers for arXiv submission.

web_search:true is set but no live search was run this pass; dim 4 grounded in the transmon-benchmark.2.litsearch substrate + domain knowledge. No missing close prior work asserted. Recommend re-running pub-litsearch with web access if a fresh sweep is desired before submission.
